title: Phlegmariurus aloifolius
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus aloifolius is a species of plant in the genus Phlegmariurus, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Lycopodiaceae. The Lycopodiaceae family is a family of vascular plants commonly known as club mosses or ground pines. This family is part of the division Lycopodiophyta, which consists of vascular plants that are non-vascular in their juvenile stages. Phlegmariurus aloifolius, as a member of the Phlegmariurus genus, is a type of club moss that is native to certain regions. The exact classification of Phlegmariurus aloifolius can be further broken down to the order Lycopodiales, subclass Lycopodiidae, and class Lycopodiopsida.
